geo.label: What is Gastro Master for Restaurants?
geo.text: Gastro Master provides restaurant owners with a complete digital system: TSE-compliant POS with table management and kitchen display, a commission-free online ordering system, plus website and ordering app — all from one provider, starting at €69 per month. Since 2023, a TSE-certified POS system has been legally required in Germany (Kassensicherungsverordnung).

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About POS Systems
faq.subtitle: Simple answers to the most important questions.

items.q: Which POS system do I need for my restaurant?
items.a: You need a [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) that is TSE-compliant. This has been mandatory since January 2023. Table management is included in the base package. Kitchen display and driver app can be added. Gastro Master has everything — from €69 per month.

items.q: What is a TSE and do I need one?
items.a: TSE stands for Technical Security Device (Technische Sicherheitseinrichtung). It's technology that secures your POS system. All transactions are stored securely. The tax office can audit them. Since January 1, 2023, TSE has been mandatory. Without TSE, fines up to €25,000 apply. All [Gastro Master POS systems](/produkte/kassensystem) are TSE-compliant.

items.q: How much does a POS system for gastronomy cost?
items.a: The [Gastro Master POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) costs from €69 per month. TSE and table management are included. Kitchen display and driver app can be added. No hidden costs. No long-term commitment.

items.q: How do I make my restaurant visible online?
items.a: You need a [website](/produkte/webseite) — so guests can find you on Google. And an [online ordering system](/produkte/webshop) — so they can order directly from you. Gastro Master does both for you. You pay no commission to Lieferando or other platforms.

items.q: Do I need a POS system as a restaurant?
items.a: Yes. Since 2023, Germany's POS security regulation (Kassensicherungsverordnung) applies. You need a TSE-compliant [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) and must issue receipts. Those who don't comply risk high fines. Gastro Master helps you set everything up quickly and correctly.
